title: Section 55
content: For the avoidance of doubt it is hereby declared that a member of the Scheduled Castes or of the Scheduled Tribes shall not be disqualified to hold a seat not reserved for members of those castes or tribes, if he is otherwise qualified to hold such seats under the Constitution and this Act 1[or under the Government of Union Territories Act, 1963 (20 of 1963), as the case may be].
footnote: 1. Added by Act 20 of 1963, s. 57 and the second Schedule (w.e.f. 13-5-1963).
